summary: 0.6.65 is a narrow image-slideshow slice: add a slideshow toggle, a Video Scrub dropdown, and an Image Slideshow dropdown, then advance still images on a timer through the existing image playlist/index path without changing movie transport or image scrub behavior.
operatorSignals: 0.6.64 restored confidence in the plugin UI and default-preset seam, so slideshow became a safe next slice.
The requested shape stayed explicitly minimal: timer-only slideshow for still images, plus dropdown-based timing controls, not a new playlist system and not a transport rewrite.
actionsTaken: Added slideshow enabled state, interval seconds, next-advance timing, and configurable skip seconds to player records.
Inserted slideshow timing only into the still-image runtime tick and reused existing image next-step semantics.
Exposed a Slideshow toggle plus Video Scrub and Image Slideshow dropdowns in the plugin UI.
nonGoals: No movie transport, sync, image scrub, or mixed-media ordering changes in this slice.
No slideshow persistence in presets yet.
